subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, thy revered companion hath drunk the cup of martyrdom from the hand of the Cupbearer of bounty, and at the altar of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله قرین محترم از ید ساقی عنایت شربت شهادت نوشید و بقربانگاه عشق
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom
